task_description: Create a complete Harbor Terminal-Bench debugging task for a time-series database compaction engine with 5 interacting bugs, TSV data format, multi-tier retention processing, and graduated test suite (4 easy / 3 medium / 3 hard)

verification.summary: NOP state: 4 pass / 6 fail. Oracle state: 10 pass / 0 fail. All 5 bugs produce measurable output differences. Bug C redesigned to use baseline_offset for actual value distortion across tiers.
